lead.description: [ ![Tailwind Capital Advisors](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/images/tailwind-logo-v2-small.jpg) ](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/) [Home](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/) [What We Do](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/what-we-do.html) [Team](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/team.html) [Portfolio](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/portfolio.html) [Contact](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/contact.html) [Take the Assessment](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/take-the-assessment.html) * [Home](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/) * [What We Do](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/what-we-do.html) * [Team](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/team.html) * [Portfolio](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/portfolio.html) * [Contact](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/contact.html) [Take the Assessment](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/take-the-assessment.html) ![](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/images/hero-background.jpg) # Raising Capital is Hard. We Make it Easier. Expert capital raising advisory for pre-seed to Series A startups raising $500K-$6.0M. From investment readiness assessment to investor introductions, we've helped 200+ companies raise over $270M+. [ Take the Assessment ](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/take-the-assessment.html) [ Learn More ](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/what-we-do.html) Our clients have been backed by leading accelerators and investors: Techstars Y Combinator 500 Startups Kickstart Mayo Clinic Shark Tank $270M+ Capital Raised 200+ Companies Served $500K-$6.0M Target Range ## Proven Results Our team has helped companies across multiple industries from e-commerce and DTC products, SaaS, Fintech and Cyber Security to healthcare diagnostics, therapeutics and services Total Capital Raised $270M+ For pre-seed to Series A companies Companies Served 200+ ↗︎ Across multiple industries Target Funding Range $500K-$6.0M Pre-seed to Series A focus ## Capital Formation Services for Seed & Series A Startups From investment readiness assessment to live investor pitches, we guide you through every step of successful fundraising. Our proven "Understand, Advise, Execute" process has helped 200+ companies raise capital. ### Capital Formation Advisory Services Comprehensive support through your entire fundraising journey. From pitch deck refinement to investor introductions, we guide you every step of the way. [ Learn More ](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/what-we-do.html) ### Investment Readiness Assessment Take our proprietary 10-minute assessment to evaluate your startup on five key components of capital readiness. Receive a personalized Investment Readiness Score and detailed report. [ Take Assessment ](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/take-the-assessment.html) ### Guided Capital Formation Journey We don't just advise—we walk beside you every step of the way. From initial assessment through term sheet signature, our team provides hands-on guidance, investor meeting preparation, and strategic support to ensure you secure the right capital on the right terms. [ Learn More ](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/what-we-do.html) ## Why Founders Choose Tailwind Capital? We're not just consultants—we're former entrepreneurs and investors who have lived the challenges you're facing. ### Been There, Done That We have been in your shoes many times before – raised millions in seed and Series financing rounds for our own companies, multiple exits through IPO and acquisition and as investors know both sides of the table. ### Active Network Direct access to High and Ultra High Net worth investors who invest their own money – perfect for early-stage companies. Great connections with VC's, accelerators, Seed Funds so the introductions are warm. ### Hands-On Support Personal guidance through pitch refinement, practice sessions, and live investor introductions. We work alongside you, not just give you a platform. ## Proven Capital Formation Process Our three-phase "Understand, Advise, Execute" methodology ensures you approach investors with confidence and clarity. * Understand * Advise * Execute 1 ### Understand We dive deep into your business to understand your strengths, weaknesses, and unique value proposition. Deep dive into company details Get to know leadership team Calculate Investment Readiness Score Secure data room review 2 ### Advise We identify critical issues and develop a strategic action plan to address weaknesses before approaching investors. Identify mitigation priorities Develop strategic action plan Provide strategic recommendations Map unique capital path 3 ### Execute We execute your capital formation plan with precision, securing the right amount from the right investors. Execute capital formation plan Right amount, right structure Connect with right investors Position for optimal meetings ## What Founders Say About Tailwind What Founders say about us. > "Tailwind Capital's blend of real-world investment and startup experience was invaluable. They understood both sides of the table and helped us craft a pitch that resonated with investors. We wouldn't have closed our seed round without them." Cami Nelson Beehive Labs > "In addition to making introductions to their network, they have provided unique insights gathered from personal experiences that have helped us navigate the world of capital formation. They assisted us in building a compelling investor focused presentation and gave us valuable feedback. Additionally, they provided unique insights that we used to help settle on a starting valuation and set realistic capital formation goals for a company at our stage." Advent Therapeutics > "I wish I had found them sooner. It would have saved us months of frustration. Their ability to help us tell a clear and concise story about what our company does and why made all the difference." Vigilant AI > "Using the advice provided by the Tailwind Team we were able to reconnect with some of our existing investors, provide them with an updated deck that led to additional investment when we had been unsuccessful before…" Dock IQ [ View Our Portfolio & Success Stories → ](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/portfolio.html) ## Ready to Raise Capital? Take our 10-minute Investment Readiness Assessment and discover exactly where your startup stands. Get a personalized roadmap to fundraising success. [ Take Free Assessment ](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/take-the-assessment.html) [ Schedule Consultation ](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/contact.html) $270M+ Capital Raised 200+ Companies Served 10 Min Assessment Time ![Tailwind Capital Advisors](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/images/tailwind-logo-v2-small.jpg) Expert capital raising advisory for startups and growth-stage companies raising pre-seed to Series A funding. #### Services * [Capital Raising Advisory](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/what-we-do.html#capital-raising) * [Investment Readiness Assessment](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/what-we-do.html#investment-readiness) * [Strategic Advisory](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/what-we-do.html#strategic-advisory) * [Take Assessment](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/take-the-assessment.html) #### Company * [Team](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/team.html) * [Portfolio](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/portfolio.html) * [Contact](https://tailwindcapitaladvisors.com/contact.html) #### Contact 66 Exchange Place Salt Lake City, UT 84111 [(801) 214-5625](tel:8012145625) info@tailwindcapitaladvisors.com **Hours:** Monday - Friday: 9am - 4pm Saturday - Sunday: Closed © 2025 Tailwind Capital Advisors. All rights reserved.
